entry.title: Stagehand
entry.description: Open-source browser automation framework for combining code, Playwright-style control, and AI-assisted web actions.
entry.seoDescription: Stagehand is an open-source browser automation framework for combining code, browser control, and AI actions.
entry.author: Browserbase
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Stagehand is a strong fit for agent workflows that need deterministic browser automation with optional AI assistance.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
